reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: A significant portion of the document is missing from the structured output. Specifically, the final two pages of the source document are entirely absent. Page 18 of 19 ('SHI (CowdStrike) Price List') and Page 19 of 19 ('PRESIDIO (CISCO) Price List') are nowhere to be found in the JSON sections.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source document contains 'SHI (CowdStrike) Price List' on page 18 of 19 and 'PRESIDIO (CISCO) Price List' on page 19 of 19.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON sections end with the 'CROWDSTRIKE' section and do not include the CowdStrike or Cisco price lists.

concerns.analysis: There are major omissions in several tables. 1. The 'Carahsoft Trellix (Formerly McAfee) Price List Continued' table in the JSON contains only 1 data row (Line 10), whereas the corresponding table on page 14 of 19 in the source contains 20 data rows (Lines 10-29). 2. The 'CrowdStrike Cost Proposal Form' table in the JSON contains only header information and 0 data rows, whereas the source on page 16 of 19 contains approximately 9 data rows detailing cost items.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Source page 14 of 19 contains lines 10-29 in the table; page 16 of 19 contains data rows for 'Cloud Subscription/Licensing Fee', 'Customization...', etc.
concerns.output_quote: The Trellix table contains only line 10; the CrowdStrike table contains only headers.
concerns.location: Sections 3 and 4, corresponding to source pages 14 and 16.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: Large sections of the source's content are not captured in the structured format (text/tables). The entire 'SOPHOS' price list (source pages 5-9 of 19) is represented only by images, with no corresponding table data or text. Similarly, the 'Carahsoft Trellix' list starting on page 13 of 19 is mostly ignored, appearing as images or severely truncated tables.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Source pages 5-9 contain extensive tabular data for Sophos products and services.
concerns.output_quote: The 'SOPHOS' section in the JSON contains only images and no structured data elements representing the content of those tables.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent. Throughout the document, price list titles for specific vendors are consistently assigned as H3 (e.g., headings 2, 3, 8, 12, 14). However, the continued section for the Trellix price list (heading 13) is promoted to H2. This is a regression in the hierarchy, as a 'Continued' heading should be at the same level as (or lower than) the heading it continues.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 14 title: "Carahsoft Trellix (Formerly McAfee) Price List (Continued)"

concerns.analysis: Several tables suffer from severe structural corruption or truncation. The 'Carahsoft Trellix' table following heading 13 (Page 14) is truncated after the first data row (Line 10), omitting lines 11 through 29. Furthermore, the content of Page 15 (Lines 30-43) is entirely missing from the section. Additionally, the 'CrowdStrike Cost Proposal Form' table (heading 15, Page 16) contains only the header row and omits all 9 data rows present in the source.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 14 table (Lines 10-29); Page 15 table (Lines 30-43); Page 16 table (9 data rows)
concerns.output_quote: The table under heading-13 contains only Line 10; heading-15 table contains only the header row; p15 data is absent.

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
